Drivers and headers for display, flash, PMIC, STM32 functions, and various peripheral interfaces.

## Folders
- **[display](display/README.md)**: Drivers and headers for ICE40LP and FPGA display control on the Snowy platform.
- **[flash](flash/README.md)**: Driver and data structures for S29VS flash memory operations and command handling.
- **[pmic](pmic/README.md)**: Driver implementation for the MAX14690 PMIC, managing power rails, I2C communication, and chip configuration.
- **[stm32_common](stm32_common/README.md)**: Button, CRC, serial debugging, GPIO, I2C, SPI, system flash, and watchdog functions for STM32.

## Files
- **[button.h](button.h.md)**: Button driver interface for initialization, state checking, interrupt handling, and self-testing.
- **[button_id.h](button_id.h.md)**: Defines button ID values for handling button input in the Pebble firmware.
- **[crc.h](crc.h.md)**: Functions for CRC32 and CRC8 calculations on byte streams, with initialization and incremental support.
- **[dbgserial.h](dbgserial.h.md)**: Functions for initializing and using a debug serial interface, including character and string output.
- **[display.h](display/README.md.h)**: Functions for initializing the display, showing boot splash, error codes, and firmware update progress.
- **[exti.h](exti.h.md)**: Header file for configuring and managing external interrupts on STM32F2 microcontrollers.
- **[exti.inl.h](exti.inl.h.md)**: Inline helper functions to enable and disable external interrupt lines.
- **[flash.h](flash/README.md.h)**: Functions for initializing, reading, and checking communication with a flash chip.
- **[gpio.h](gpio.h.md)**: Header file for GPIO initialization and configuration functions for STM32F2 and STM32F4 microcontrollers.
- **[i2c.h](i2c.h.md)**: I2C driver interface for initialization, usage, reset, and register read/write operations.
- **[periph_config.h](periph_config.h.md)**: Configuration and control functions for peripheral clocks on STM32 microcontrollers.
- **[pmic.h](pmic/README.md.h)**: Functions for initializing and managing the PMIC, including power, charging, and battery monitoring.
- **[spi.h](spi.h.md)**: Defines SPI peripheral clock types and a function to find the nearest SPI prescaler.
- **[system_flash.h](system_flash.h.md)**: Defines functions and constants for erasing, writing, and reading STM32 flash memory sectors.
- **[watchdog.h](watchdog.h.md)**: Watchdog driver interface with functions to initialize, start, feed, and manage reset flags.
